action: Create a browser-compatible adapter that captures Vercel audio observability globals into the R-032 evidence packet without collapsing processing and audibility claims.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed using Web Crypto
progress.claim_boundary: processing evidence remains distinct from independently observed audibility

handoff: Vercel Studio should import the adapter, supply the deployed commit and session identifier, capture window.__MC_AUDIO_EVIDENCE__ and window.__MC_AUDIO_PULSE__, and export the packet alongside a separately recorded iPhone audible outcome.
